research.title: Undergraduate Research Assistant
description: Investigate changes in galaxies' densities during galaxy quenching
Processed IllustrisTNG cosmological magnetohydrodynamical simulations data to statistically visualize compaction effect at the end of galaxies evolution on high performance computing clusters (HPC)

work.title: Software Developer

Assisted with integrating business analytics tools and user-data protection within different networking protocols (SOAP and REST APIs) in the application

work.title: Certification Engineer (Co-op)

experience.title: Stable Matching Quantum Algorithm
experience.nature: Special Topics in Theoretical Computing Science - Intro to Quantum Computing
description: Utilized Grover’s algorithm and designed a quantum algorithm ($O(n\sqrt{n})$) which outperformed the classical Gale-Shapley stable matching algorithm ($O(n^2)$) in terms of time complexity
Researched and designed search blackboxes for all entities in the proof of concept demo
Designed method to compute stability of all possible stable matches and return the moststable matching pair with an accuracy of 75\% on Qiskit Aer quantum computing simulator

experience.title: Variable Star Photometry
description: Compiled a calibrated dataset from raw data with Python by reducing the effects of atmospheric extinction and cosmic rays with Python and several astrophysics packages (SEP e.g.)
Applied numerous operations on dataset with and derived meaningful information using domain knowledge in astrophysics (luminosity periodicity in variable stars e.g.)
Produced an observation proposal regarding the ideal target and telescope usage time calculation and a journal paper with methodology, calculation results and graphical results

experience.title: Anomaly Detection in Power Grid Data
experience.nature: Special Topic in Computing Science - Cybersecurity
description: Explored unlabelled data and gave seasonality of power grid usage trend by visualizing the data and using linear regression with R Language
Identified a valid time window and used Max-min method in detecting point anomaly
Used log-likelihood method for contextual anomaly detection by constructing and training a Hidden Markov Model with given training data

technique: Python (+ astronomy and machine learning libraries \& quantum computing frameworks)
